services.webDesc: Modern, performant web applications using Next.js, Angular, and Blazor with .NET Core backends.
services.mobileDesc: Cross-platform mobile applications that deliver exceptional user experiences on iOS and Android.
services.gameDesc: Engaging game experiences built with industry-standard tools and creative design.
services.aiDesc: Intelligent automation solutions powered by AI agents to streamline your business workflows.
services.backendDesc: Scalable APIs and microservices using Go, Node.js, and .NET Core with PostgreSQL and Redis.
services.devopsDesc: CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, and self-hosted or cloud server management.

projects.heroSubtitle: Innovative products built by the WowSyler team.
projects.textManipulatorDesc: An autonomous text manipulation tool featuring a powerful workflow system. Chain multiple text operations — trim, append to line ends, replace values — into a single seamless flow. Designed for developers and content creators who need repeatable, automated text processing.
projects.textManipulatorLong: TextManipulator.com revolutionizes how you process text by letting you build custom workflows. Each step in the workflow applies a specific transformation — trimming whitespace, appending characters to line beginnings or ends, replacing patterns, and more. Once you build a workflow, you can save and reuse it, making repetitive text tasks effortless.
projects.airdropBotDesc: A professional, proxy-supported bot for hunting airdrops across EVM-compatible blockchain networks. Features multi-wallet support, unpredictable transaction timing to avoid detection, and each wallet is assigned its own IP address for maximum safety.
projects.airdropBotLong: AirdropBotPro.com is the ultimate tool for crypto airdrop hunters. Supports multiple EVM networks, assigns dedicated proxy IPs to each wallet, randomizes transaction timing to mimic human behavior, and provides a clean multi-language interface for global users.
projects.streeaDesc: A comprehensive content discovery platform for movies, series, games, books, and music. Users can browse information, read articles and reviews, comment, rate, and add content. Features a personal timeline and a unique cross-content relationship system.
projects.streeaLong: Streea.com is more than just a catalog — it's a mini social network for entertainment content. The standout feature is cross-content relationship linking: when you view a film like Dune, you'll see related games, books, soundtracks, and more. Build your personal timeline, follow friends, and discover content in a whole new way.

about.heroSubtitle: A passionate team of engineers and creators building tomorrow's software today.
about.storyText1: WowSyler Teknoloji was founded with a single vision: to build exceptional software that makes a real difference. We started as a small team of passionate developers and have grown into a full-service technology company delivering web, mobile, game, and AI solutions.
about.storyText2: Our name reflects our ambition — we aim to create products that make people say "wow." Every line of code we write, every interface we design, and every system we architect is crafted with excellence in mind.
about.storyText3: Today, WowSyler serves clients across industries, delivering robust and scalable applications. We're proud of the products we've built and even more excited about what's coming next.
about.missionText: To deliver world-class software solutions that empower businesses and delight users — by combining technical excellence with creative innovation.

values.qualityDesc: We never cut corners. Every project is built to the highest standards, from architecture to UI.
values.innovationDesc: We stay ahead of the curve, adopting new technologies and approaches to deliver better solutions.
values.transparencyDesc: We communicate openly with clients and stakeholders throughout every stage of development.
values.ownershipDesc: We treat every project as if it were our own product — with dedication, care, and pride.
values.collaborationDesc: We partner closely with our clients, treating their goals as our own to deliver the best outcomes.
values.deliveryDesc: We respect deadlines and set realistic expectations, ensuring projects ship when promised.

about.expertiseSubtitle: Technologies we've mastered to deliver outstanding results.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Reach out and let's make something great together.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.infoText: We're always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
contact.readyText: Every great product starts with a conversation. Send us a message and we'll get back to you quickly.

services.heroSubtitle: Comprehensive software development services to take your idea from concept to production.
services.webDesc: We build modern, fast, and scalable web applications. Our team has deep expertise in React/Next.js for powerful frontends, Angular for enterprise-grade SPAs, and Blazor for .NET-integrated web apps. Every project is built with SEO, performance, and accessibility in mind.
services.mobileDesc: We develop cross-platform mobile applications that feel native on both iOS and Android. Our mobile solutions are built for performance, reliability, and an outstanding user experience.
services.gameDesc: From casual mobile games to complex interactive experiences, our game development team brings creative visions to life. We focus on engaging gameplay, polished graphics, and optimized performance.
services.aiDesc: We design and deploy intelligent AI agents and automation systems that transform your business operations. From workflow automation to intelligent decision-making systems, we leverage the latest in AI technology.
services.backendDesc: Rock-solid backend services and APIs that power your applications. We specialize in building high-performance, scalable architectures using Go, Node.js, and .NET Core, backed by PostgreSQL, Redis, and RabbitMQ.
services.devopsDesc: We set up and manage the infrastructure that keeps your applications running smoothly. From CI/CD pipelines to containerized deployments, we ensure your systems are reliable, scalable, and secure.
services.ctaText: Contact our team and let's discuss how we can help you achieve your goals.
